description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a straight, light-colored wooden handle. The head is composed of two main parts: a flat striking face for driving nails and a curved claw for extracting them. The handle is rectangular in cross-section, slightly tapered, and appears to be made of unfinished or lightly finished wood, providing a natural grip. The metallic head is a matte silver-gray, with clear demarcation between the striking face and the claw. There are visible manufacturer markings on the side of the head and a label on the handle. The hammer appears clean and unused, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A classic claw hammer with a silver metallic head and a straight, light wood handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, including the flat striking face, curved claw, and the manufacturer's marking on the head.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the head and handle, with the striking face and claw aligned in depth.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the claw's curvature and a label on the wooden handle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hammer head and the handle's rectangular cross-section.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, rectangular in cross-section, light-colored, smooth with no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: claw hammer head, metallic, with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other
attribute_brand_or_logo: LOUIS, visible on the side of the hammer head and a label on the handle
